Source URL: https://www.apexaccelerators.us/

# APEX Houston 77084 BOSS Resource Pack Manifest

Review date: 2026-06-28
Primary source reviewed: https://www.apexaccelerators.us/
Primary geography: Houston area, ZIP 77084 example
Organization reviewed: APEX Accelerators; UH APEX Accelerator; linked UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC and SCORE Houston resources
Output format: Markdown only

## File count
71 Markdown files are included in this pack, including this manifest.

## Pack purpose
This pack is formatted for ingestion into the BOSS Library. Each resource file begins with `Source URL:` on line one so BOSS can preserve user-facing official links.

## Routing principles used
- Discover -> Diagnose -> Classify -> Route -> Recommend Next Action.
- Route based on business stage, topic, geography, eligibility, urgency, and user readiness.
- Prefer official local resources when geography matters.
- Prefer process pages for how-do-I-start questions.
- Prefer tools/templates when the user is ready to produce a document.
- Prefer advisor/mentor/counseling routes when the user needs judgment, local help, or personalized next steps.
- Use APEX when the business is formed, for-profit, locally eligible, and pursuing government contracting.
- Use SBDC or SCORE first when the user is idea-stage, not legally formed, or needs general business planning before procurement.

## Important local note
ZIP 77084 should be treated as a location clue, not a final service-area decision. Ask for the user's exact city, county, and physical business address. UH APEX covers Harris, Fort Bend, Waller, and other listed counties, but SBDC center boundaries may differ. When local SBDC routing is uncertain, use the official Find Your SBDC locator.

## Important APEX readiness note
UH APEX is not the main first route for people only thinking about starting a business. Route those users to SBDC and/or SCORE first. Return to APEX when the business is legally formed, for-profit, in service area, and ready to sell products or services government agencies buy.
